steps.t: Barley can be found in the fields of southern Yondershire. You should collect barley from the fields.
A malting container can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should add the barley to the malting container.
A mashing pot can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should add the malted barley to the mashing pot.
A boiling pot can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should add the barley to the boiling pot.
A fermenting container can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should add the boiled brew to the fermenting container.
Empty bottles can be found around the farm, and both outside and inside The Fox and Fiddle Inn in the village of Nobottle. You should collect some emp…
A fermenting container can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should bottle the brew with the empty bottles that you collected.
Brewmaster Bloda Hopblossom can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should talk to Brewmaster Bloda Hopblossom.
Taverns can be found in each of the four villages in Yondershire. You should deliver your brews to each of the four taverns in Yondershire.
